text.title: AI Latency Waterfall Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is tracing instrumentation present (per-segment spans available)?

branch.when: instrumented == true AND enough_samples == true AND over_budget_max == prefill_cold

conclusion.verdict: Optimise prefix caching: stabilise system prompt, add cache_control markers, raise cache_hit_rate target.

branch.when: instrumented == true AND enough_samples == true AND over_budget_max == decode_tps

conclusion.verdict: Reduce output length OR switch to a faster model in the same family; verify trajectory eval did not regress.

branch.when: instrumented == true AND enough_samples == true AND over_budget_max startswith tool_

conclusion.verdict: Optimise the named tool (parallelise calls, cache results, replace upstream provider).

branch.when: instrumented == true AND enough_samples == true AND over_budget_max == none

conclusion.verdict: All segments within budget but end-to-end exceeds SLA → SLA is too aggressive; renegotiate.
Extend observation window; sample older traces. Recommendations on n<30 are unreliable.
Instrument tracing first (OTel / LangSmith). No useful waterfall without spans.
preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.
